commit 5709d81a5f2b591db1f4a2f8b7db2c90c809acbf
Author: Test User <test@example.com>
Date:   Sun May 3 08:59:07 2026 -0400

    feat(web): rename providers tab to 'Agent availability', add inline model list + per-row refresh [ddx-bbac06c9]
    
    - NavShell: rename 'Providers' → 'Agent availability'
    - providers/+page.svelte: rename page title and h1 to 'Agent availability';
      add 'Models' column with expand toggle showing inline model list
      (truncated to 10 with drilldown link to per-provider detail page);
      add per-row refresh button calling refreshProviderModels mutation
    - e2e: update heading assertion
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/providers.spec.ts |   2 +-
 .../frontend/src/lib/components/NavShell.svelte    |   4 +-
 .../routes/nodes/[nodeId]/providers/+page.svelte   | 199 ++++++++++++++++++++-
 3 files changed, 198 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

1	import { defineConfig } from '@playwright/test';
2	import path from 'node:path';
3	import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';
4	
5	const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
6	
7	// The default Playwright harness boots the Go DDx server against a temp copy
8	// of e2e/fixtures/ so the API endpoints exercised by TC-008 (and other
9	// backend-dependent specs) return real data without reading the developer's
10	// $HOME or the repository's live .ddx/ state.
11	
12	const CLI_PKG_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, '../../..');
13	const FRONTEND_DIR = __dirname;
14	const FIXTURE_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, 'e2e/fixtures');
15	const PORT = Number(process.env.DDX_E2E_PORT ?? 4174);
16	const BASE_URL = `https://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`;
17	
18	// Build the SvelteKit frontend (so cli/internal/server/embed.go has assets to
19	// embed), copy the fixture workspace into a fresh temp dir, build the ddx
20	// binary from the cli module, and exec it from the temp dir. The temp dir has
21	// no .git so FindProjectRoot falls back to it, and tsnet is disabled so the
22	// harness has no Tailscale dependency.
23	const bootCommand = [
24		`set -e`,
25		`(cd "${FRONTEND_DIR}" && bun run build >&2)`,
26		`TMP=$(mktemp -d -t ddx-e2e-XXXXXX)`,
27		`cp -R "${FIXTURE_DIR}/." "$TMP/"`,
28		`(cd "${CLI_PKG_DIR}" && go build -o "$TMP/ddx" .)`,
29		`cd "$TMP"`,
30		`DDX_OPERATOR_PROMPT_ALLOWLIST=localhost exec ./ddx server --tsnet=false --addr=127.0.0.1 --port=${PORT}`
31	].join(' && ');
32	
33	export default defineConfig({
34		webServer: {
35			command: `bash -c '${bootCommand}'`,
36			url: `${BASE_URL}/api/health`,
37			ignoreHTTPSErrors: true,
38			reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
39			timeout: 180_000,
40			stdout: 'pipe',
41			stderr: 'pipe'
42		},
43		use: {
44			baseURL: BASE_URL,
45			ignoreHTTPSErrors: true
46		},
47		testMatch: ['**/*.e2e.{ts,js}', 'e2e/**/*.spec.ts']
48	});
49

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
test(web): add Playwright e2e for 5-provider availability scenario [ddx-1c8719eb]

- Mocks 5 providers (claude, codex, openrouter, lmstudio @vidar,
  lmstudio @bragi) plus per-provider model lists via GraphQL route
  interception.
- TC-068 asserts all 5 rows render and each inline model list shows
  an expected model after expansion; the 200-model openrouter row
  also shows the truncation drilldown link.
- TC-069 asserts the per-row refresh button fires the
  RefreshProviderModels mutation with the right name/kind variables
  for both a HARNESS and an ENDPOINT row.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

[detached HEAD 75d6aa7a] test(web): add Playwright e2e for 5-provider availability scenario [ddx-1c8719eb]
 1 file changed, 331 insertions(+)
 create mode 100644 cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/providers-five-scenario.spec.ts

data.text:
Committed as 75d6aa7a. The test file `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/providers-five-scenario.spec.ts` adds:

- **AC1** — `mockGraphQL` fixture mocks the 5 named providers (claude, codex, openrouter, lmstudio @vidar, lmstudio @bragi) and per-provider `ProviderModels` / `RefreshProviderModels` payloads.
- **AC2** — `TC-068` asserts each of the 5 rows is visible, expands each row, and verifies the inline model list shows an expected model id; the 200-model openrouter row also shows the truncation drilldown link.
- **AC3** — `TC-069` clicks the per-row refresh button on `claude` (HARNESS) and `openrouter` (ENDPOINT), and asserts each click increments the `RefreshProviderModels` call counter and routes the correct `name`/`kind` variables.

Both tests pass locally (`bunx playwright test e2e/providers-five-scenario.spec.ts` → 2 passed).
